---
title: "EPA progress"
output: html_document
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

##  Site 0034
```{r}
# Load required library
library(readr)
library(dplyr)

# Step 1: Read in Site 0034 
df_0034 <- read_csv("epa_pm25_site_0034.csv")

# Preview structure
glimpse(df_0034)

# Select only 24-hour data
df_0034_24hr <- df_0034 %>%
  filter(sample_duration == "24 HOUR") %>%
  select(date_local, sample_measurement) %>%
  rename(PM25_0034F = sample_measurement)

# Preview
head(df_0034_24hr)

# Average duplicate entries by date
df_0034_24hr_avg <- df_0034_24hr %>%
  group_by(date_local) %>%
  summarise(PM25_0034F = mean(PM25_0034F, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# Select only 1-hour data
df_0034_1hr <- df_0034 %>%
  filter(sample_duration == "1 HOUR") %>%
  select(date_local, time_local, sample_measurement) %>%
  rename(PM25_0034H = sample_measurement)

head(df_0034_1hr)

# Daily averages from the 1-hour data
df_0034_1hr_avg <- df_0034_1hr %>%
  group_by(date_local) %>%
  summarise(PM25_0034H = mean(PM25_0034H, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

```

## Site 0038
```{r}
# Load required library
library(readr)
library(dplyr)

# Step 1: Read in Site 0038
df_0038 <- read_csv("epa_pm25_site_0038.csv")

# Preview structure
glimpse(df_0038)

# Filter only 24-hour data
df_0038_24hr <- df_0038 %>%
  filter(sample_duration == "24 HOUR") %>%
  select(date_local, sample_measurement) %>%
  rename(PM25_0038F = sample_measurement)

# Preview
head(df_0038_24hr)

# Average duplicate entries by date
df_0038_24hr_avg <- df_0038 %>%
  filter(sample_duration == "24 HOUR") %>%
  select(date_local, sample_measurement) %>%
  rename(PM25_0038F = sample_measurement) %>%
  group_by(date_local) %>%
  summarise(PM25_0038F = mean(PM25_0038F, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# Filter only 1-hour data
df_0038_1hr <- df_0038 %>%
  filter(sample_duration == "1 HOUR") %>%
  select(date_local, time_local, sample_measurement) %>%
  rename(PM25_0038H = sample_measurement)

head(df_0038_1hr)

# Daily averages from the 1-hour data
df_0038_1hr_avg <- df_0038_1hr %>%
  group_by(date_local) %>%
  summarise(PM25_0038H = mean(PM25_0038H, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
```


## Site 0045
```{r}

# Load required library
library(readr)
library(dplyr)

# Read in Site 0045
df_0045 <- read_csv("epa_pm25_site_0045.csv")

# Preview structure
glimpse(df_0045)

# Filter only 24-hour data
df_0045_24hr <- df_0045 %>%
  filter(sample_duration == "24 HOUR") %>%
  select(date_local, sample_measurement) %>%
  rename(PM25_0045F = sample_measurement)

head(df_0045_24hr)

# Average duplicate entries by date
df_0045_24hr_avg <- df_0045 %>%
  filter(sample_duration == "24 HOUR") %>%
  select(date_local, sample_measurement) %>%
  rename(PM25_0045F = sample_measurement) %>%
  group_by(date_local) %>%
  summarise(PM25_0045F = mean(PM25_0045F, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# Filter only 1-hour data
df_0045_1hr <- df_0045 %>%
  filter(sample_duration == "1 HOUR") %>%
  select(date_local, time_local, sample_measurement) %>%
  rename(PM25_0045H = sample_measurement)

head(df_0045_1hr)

# Daily averages from the 1-hour data
df_0045_1hr_avg <- df_0045_1hr %>%
  group_by(date_local) %>%
  summarise(PM25_0045H = mean(PM25_0045H, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
```


## Site 0060
```{r}
# Load required library
library(readr)
library(dplyr)

# Step 1: Read in Site 0060 separately
df_0060 <- read_csv("epa_pm25_site_0060.csv")

# Preview structure
glimpse(df_0060)

# Filter only 24-hour data
df_0060_24hr <- df_0060 %>%
  filter(sample_duration == "24 HOUR") %>%
  select(date_local, sample_measurement) %>%
  rename(PM25_0060F = sample_measurement)

head(df_0060_24hr)

# Average duplicate entries by date
df_0060_24hr_avg <- df_0060 %>%
  filter(sample_duration == "24 HOUR") %>%
  select(date_local, sample_measurement) %>%
  rename(PM25_0060F = sample_measurement) %>%
  group_by(date_local) %>%
  summarise(PM25_0060F = mean(PM25_0060F, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# Filter only 1-hour data
df_0060_1hr <- df_0060 %>%
  filter(sample_duration == "1 HOUR") %>%
  select(date_local, time_local, sample_measurement) %>%
  rename(PM25_0060H = sample_measurement)

head(df_0060_1hr)

# Daily averages from the 1-hour data
df_0060_1hr_avg <- df_0060_1hr %>%
  group_by(date_local) %>%
  summarise(PM25_0060H = mean(PM25_0060H, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
```

## Site 0065
```{r}
# Load required library
library(readr)
library(dplyr)

# Step 1: Read in Site 0065 separately
df_0065 <- read_csv("epa_pm25_site_0065.csv")

# Preview structure
glimpse(df_0065)

# Filter only 24-hour data
df_0065_24hr <- df_0065 %>%
  filter(sample_duration == "24 HOUR") %>%
  select(date_local, sample_measurement) %>%
  rename(PM25_0065F = sample_measurement)

head(df_0065_24hr)

# Average duplicate entries by date

df_0065_24hr_avg <- df_0065 %>%
  filter(sample_duration == "24 HOUR") %>%
  select(date_local, sample_measurement) %>%
  rename(PM25_0065F = sample_measurement) %>%
  group_by(date_local) %>%
  summarise(PM25_0065F = mean(PM25_0065F, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# Filter only 1-hour data
df_0065_1hr <- df_0065 %>%
  filter(sample_duration == "1 HOUR") %>%
  select(date_local, time_local, sample_measurement) %>%
  rename(PM25_0065H = sample_measurement)

head(df_0065_1hr)

# Daily averages from the 1-hour data
df_0065_1hr_avg <- df_0065_1hr %>%
  group_by(date_local) %>%
  summarise(PM25_0065H = mean(PM25_0065H, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
```

## Site 0073
```{r}
# Load required library
library(readr)
library(dplyr)

# Read in Site 0073
df_0073 <- read_csv("epa_pm25_site_0073.csv")

# Preview structure
glimpse(df_0073)

# Filter only 24-hour data
df_0073_24hr <- df_0073 %>%
  filter(sample_duration == "24 HOUR") %>%
  select(date_local, sample_measurement) %>%
  rename(PM25_0073F = sample_measurement)

head(df_0073_24hr)

# Average duplicate entries by date

df_0073_24hr_avg <- df_0073 %>%
  filter(sample_duration == "24 HOUR") %>%
  select(date_local, sample_measurement) %>%
  rename(PM25_0073F = sample_measurement) %>%
  group_by(date_local) %>%
  summarise(PM25_0073F = mean(PM25_0073F, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# Filter only 1-hour data
df_0073_1hr <- df_0073 %>%
  filter(sample_duration == "1 HOUR") %>%
  select(date_local, time_local, sample_measurement) %>%
  rename(PM25_0073H = sample_measurement)

head(df_0073_1hr)

# Daily averages from the 1-hour data
df_0073_1hr_avg <- df_0073_1hr %>%
  group_by(date_local) %>%
  summarise(PM25_0073H = mean(PM25_0073H, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")


```

## Combine all 24-hour dataframes into one master dataframe by date
```{r}
library(purrr)
library(purrr)  # <-- add this if not already loaded

df_filter_all <- reduce(
  list(df_0034_24hr, df_0038_24hr, df_0045_24hr, df_0060_24hr, df_0065_24hr, df_0073_24hr),
  full_join,
  by = "date_local"
)

head(df_filter_all)
```

## Combine all 1-hour dataframes into one dataframe by date
```{r}
df_hourly_all <- reduce(
  list(df_0034_1hr_avg, df_0038_1hr_avg, df_0045_1hr_avg, df_0060_1hr_avg, df_0065_1hr_avg, df_0073_1hr_avg),
  full_join,
  by = "date_local"
)

head(df_hourly_all)
```

# list of all dates
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)
library(purrr)

# Replace with the actual full date range in your data
all_dates <- tibble(date_local = seq.Date(
  from = as.Date("2024-11-01"),
  to = as.Date("2025-05-31"),
  by = "day"
))

# Site 0034
df_0034_24hr_full <- left_join(all_dates, df_0034_24hr, by = "date_local")
df_0034_1hr_full  <- left_join(all_dates, df_0034_1hr,  by = "date_local")

# Site 0038
df_0038_24hr_full <- left_join(all_dates, df_0038_24hr, by = "date_local")
df_0038_1hr_full  <- left_join(all_dates, df_0038_1hr,  by = "date_local")

# Site 0045
df_0045_24hr_full <- left_join(all_dates, df_0045_24hr, by = "date_local")
df_0045_1hr_full  <- left_join(all_dates, df_0045_1hr,  by = "date_local")

# Site 0060
df_0060_24hr_full <- left_join(all_dates, df_0060_24hr, by = "date_local")
df_0060_1hr_full  <- left_join(all_dates, df_0060_1hr,  by = "date_local")

# Site 0065
df_0065_24hr_full <- left_join(all_dates, df_0065_24hr, by = "date_local")
df_0065_1hr_full  <- left_join(all_dates, df_0065_1hr,  by = "date_local")

# Site 0073
df_0073_24hr_full <- left_join(all_dates, df_0073_24hr, by = "date_local")
df_0073_1hr_full  <- left_join(all_dates, df_0073_1hr,  by = "date_local")


```

#

```{r}

library(dplyr)

df_combined <- all_dates %>%
  left_join(df_0034_24hr,    by = "date_local") %>%
  left_join(df_0034_1hr_avg, by = "date_local") %>%
  left_join(df_0038_24hr,    by = "date_local") %>%
  left_join(df_0038_1hr_avg, by = "date_local") %>%
  left_join(df_0045_24hr,    by = "date_local") %>%
  left_join(df_0045_1hr_avg, by = "date_local") %>%
  left_join(df_0060_24hr,    by = "date_local") %>%
  left_join(df_0060_1hr_avg, by = "date_local") %>%
  left_join(df_0065_24hr,    by = "date_local") %>%
  left_join(df_0065_1hr_avg, by = "date_local") %>%
  left_join(df_0073_24hr,    by = "date_local") %>%
  left_join(df_0073_1hr_avg, by = "date_local")

# result
glimpse(df_combined)
summary(df_combined)
  
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)

# Plot for Site 0034
model_0034 <- lm(PM25_0034H ~ PM25_0034F, data = df_combined)
summary_0034 <- summary(model_0034)
r_squared_0034 <- round(summary_0034$r.squared, 4)
intercept_0034 <- round(coef(model_0034)[1], 4)
slope_0034 <- round(coef(model_0034)[2], 4)
label_0034 <- paste0("y = ", slope_0034, "x + ", intercept_0034, "\nR² = ", r_squared_0034)

x_pos <- quantile(df_combined$PM25_0034F, 0.05, na.rm = TRUE)  # 5th percentile for x
y_pos <- quantile(df_combined$PM25_0034H, 0.95, na.rm = TRUE)  # 95th percentile for y

ggplot(df_combined, aes(x = PM25_0034F, y = PM25_0034H)) +
  geom_point(color = "steelblue", size = 2) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "black", linewidth = 0.6) +
  annotate("text", x = x_pos, y = y_pos, label = label_0034, hjust = 0, vjust = 1, size = 5, fontface = "bold") +
  labs(title = "Site 0034: Filter vs. Hourly Avg PM2.5", x = "24-Hour Filter PM2.5 (µg/m³)", y = "Daily Avg of Hourly PM2.5 (µg/m³)") +
  coord_fixed() + theme_minimal()


# Plot for Site 0038
model_0038 <- lm(PM25_0038H ~ PM25_0038F, data = df_combined)
summary_0038 <- summary(model_0038)
r_squared_0038 <- round(summary_0038$r.squared, 4)
intercept_0038 <- round(coef(model_0038)[1], 4)
slope_0038 <- round(coef(model_0038)[2], 4)
label_0038 <- paste0("y = ", slope_0038, "x + ", intercept_0038, "\nR² = ", r_squared_0038)

x_pos <- quantile(df_combined$PM25_0038F, 0.05, na.rm = TRUE)
y_pos <- quantile(df_combined$PM25_0038H, 0.95, na.rm = TRUE)

ggplot(df_combined, aes(x = PM25_0038F, y = PM25_0038H)) +
  geom_point(color = "steelblue", size = 2) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "black", linewidth = 0.6) +
  annotate("text", x = x_pos, y = y_pos, label = label_0038, hjust = 0, vjust = 1, size = 5, fontface = "bold") +
  labs(title = "Site 0038: Filter vs. Hourly Avg PM2.5", x = "24-Hour Filter PM2.5 (µg/m³)", y = "Daily Avg of Hourly PM2.5 (µg/m³)") +
  coord_fixed() + theme_minimal()

# Plot for Site 0045
model_0045 <- lm(PM25_0045H ~ PM25_0045F, data = df_combined)
summary_0045 <- summary(model_0045)
r_squared_0045 <- round(summary_0045$r.squared, 4)
intercept_0045 <- round(coef(model_0045)[1], 4)
slope_0045 <- round(coef(model_0045)[2], 4)
label_0045 <- paste0("y = ", slope_0045, "x + ", intercept_0045, "\nR² = ", r_squared_0045)

x_pos_0045 <- quantile(df_combined$PM25_0045F, 0.05, na.rm = TRUE)
y_pos_0045 <- quantile(df_combined$PM25_0045H, 0.95, na.rm = TRUE)

ggplot(df_combined, aes(x = PM25_0045F, y = PM25_0045H)) +
  geom_point(color = "steelblue", size = 2) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "black", linewidth = 0.6) +
  annotate("text", x = x_pos_0045, y = y_pos_0045, label = label_0045, hjust = 0, vjust = 1, size = 5, fontface = "bold") +
  labs(title = "Site 0045: Filter vs. Hourly Avg PM2.5", x = "24-Hour Filter PM2.5 (µg/m³)", y = "Daily Avg of Hourly PM2.5 (µg/m³)") +
  coord_fixed() + theme_minimal()

# Plot for Site 0060
model_0060 <- lm(PM25_0060H ~ PM25_0060F, data = df_combined)
summary_0060 <- summary(model_0060)
r_squared_0060 <- round(summary_0060$r.squared, 4)
intercept_0060 <- round(coef(model_0060)[1], 4)
slope_0060 <- round(coef(model_0060)[2], 4)
label_0060 <- paste0("y = ", slope_0060, "x + ", intercept_0060, "\nR² = ", r_squared_0060)

x_pos_0060 <- quantile(df_combined$PM25_0060F, 0.05, na.rm = TRUE)
y_pos_0060 <- quantile(df_combined$PM25_0060H, 0.95, na.rm = TRUE)

ggplot(df_combined, aes(x = PM25_0060F, y = PM25_0060H)) +
  geom_point(color = "steelblue", size = 2) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "black", linewidth = 0.6) +
  annotate("text", x = x_pos_0060, y = y_pos_0060, label = label_0060, hjust = 0, vjust = 1, size = 5, fontface = "bold") +
  labs(title = "Site 0060: Filter vs. Hourly Avg PM2.5", x = "24-Hour Filter PM2.5 (µg/m³)", y = "Daily Avg of Hourly PM2.5 (µg/m³)") +
  coord_fixed() + theme_minimal()

# Plot for Site 0065
model_0065 <- lm(PM25_0065H ~ PM25_0065F, data = df_combined)
summary_0065 <- summary(model_0065)
r_squared_0065 <- round(summary_0065$r.squared, 4)
intercept_0065 <- round(coef(model_0065)[1], 4)
slope_0065 <- round(coef(model_0065)[2], 4)
label_0065 <- paste0("y = ", slope_0065, "x + ", intercept_0065, "\nR² = ", r_squared_0065)

x_pos_0065 <- quantile(df_combined$PM25_0065F, 0.05, na.rm = TRUE)
y_pos_0065 <- quantile(df_combined$PM25_0065H, 0.95, na.rm = TRUE)

ggplot(df_combined, aes(x = PM25_0065F, y = PM25_0065H)) +
  geom_point(color = "steelblue", size = 2) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "black", linewidth = 0.6) +
  annotate("text", x = x_pos_0065, y = y_pos_0065, label = label_0065, hjust = 0, vjust = 1, size = 5, fontface = "bold") +
  labs(title = "Site 0065: Filter vs. Hourly Avg PM2.5", x = "24-Hour Filter PM2.5 (µg/m³)", y = "Daily Avg of Hourly PM2.5 (µg/m³)") +
  coord_fixed() + theme_minimal()

# Plot for Site 0073
model_0073 <- lm(PM25_0073H ~ PM25_0073F, data = df_combined)
summary_0073 <- summary(model_0073)
r_squared_0073 <- round(summary_0073$r.squared, 4)
intercept_0073 <- round(coef(model_0073)[1], 4)
slope_0073 <- round(coef(model_0073)[2], 4)
label_0073 <- paste0("y = ", slope_0073, "x + ", intercept_0073, "\nR² = ", r_squared_0073)

x_pos_0073 <- quantile(df_combined$PM25_0073F, 0.05, na.rm = TRUE)
y_pos_0073 <- quantile(df_combined$PM25_0073H, 0.95, na.rm = TRUE)

ggplot(df_combined, aes(x = PM25_0073F, y = PM25_0073H)) +
  geom_point(color = "steelblue", size = 2) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "black", linewidth = 0.6) +
  annotate("text", x = x_pos_0073, y = y_pos_0073, label = label_0073, hjust = 0, vjust = 1, size = 5, fontface = "bold") +
  labs(title = "Site 0073: Filter vs. Hourly Avg PM2.5", x = "24-Hour Filter PM2.5 (µg/m³)", y = "Daily Avg of Hourly PM2.5 (µg/m³)") +
  coord_fixed() + theme_minimal()

```
```{r}
summary_df <- data.frame(
  Site = c("0034", "0038", "0045", "0060", "0065", "0073"),
  Slope = c(slope_0034, slope_0038, slope_0045, slope_0060, slope_0065, slope_0073),
  Intercept = c(intercept_0034, intercept_0038, intercept_0045, intercept_0060, intercept_0065, intercept_0073),
  R2 = c(r_squared_0034, r_squared_0038, r_squared_0045, r_squared_0060, r_squared_0065, r_squared_0073)
)
summary_df
```

# 6x6 MATRIX PLOT OF FILTER DATA COMPARISONS.
```{r epa-6x6-filter-grid, fig.width=22, fig.height=22, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

# Load necessary libraries
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(gridExtra)

# List of site numbers and their corresponding dataframes
site_dfs <- list(
  "0034" = df_0034,
  "0038" = df_0038,
  "0045" = df_0045,
  "0060" = df_0060,
  "0065" = df_0065,
  "0073" = df_0073
)

# Create a combined daily average dataframe
epa_24hr_clean <- bind_rows(
  lapply(names(site_dfs), function(site) {
    df <- site_dfs[[site]]
    df %>%
      filter(sample_duration == "24 HOUR") %>%
      group_by(date_local) %>%
      summarise(pm25 = mean(sample_measurement, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
      mutate(site_number = site, date = as.Date(date_local)) %>%
      select(date, site_number, pm25)
  })
)

# Prepare and reshape the data into wide format
epa_wide <- epa_24hr_clean %>%
  select(date, site_number, pm25) %>%
  mutate(site_number = as.character(site_number)) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = site_number, values_from = pm25, values_fn = mean) %>%
  filter(rowSums(is.na(across(-date))) < 3)

# Set up plotting variables
site_names <- sort(setdiff(names(epa_wide), "date"))
n_sites <- length(site_names)
axis_min <- 0
axis_max <- 28

# Create matrix of plots
plot_matrix <- vector("list", n_sites * n_sites)

for (i in seq_len(n_sites)) {
  for (j in seq_len(n_sites)) {
    x_site <- site_names[j]
    y_site <- site_names[i]
    index <- (i - 1) * n_sites + j

    df_pair <- epa_wide %>%
      select(x = all_of(x_site), y = all_of(y_site)) %>%
      filter(!is.na(x) & !is.na(y))

    if (nrow(df_pair) > 2) {
      model <- lm(y ~ x, data = df_pair)
      r2 <- summary(model)$r.squared
      coef_vals <- coef(model)
      eq_label <- paste0("y = ", round(coef_vals[2], 2), "x + ", round(coef_vals[1], 2), 
                         "\nR² = ", round(r2, 2))
    } else {
      eq_label <- "Not enough data"
    }

    p <- ggplot(df_pair, aes(x = x, y = y)) +
      geom_point(color = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7, size = 1.8) +
      geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "red", linewidth = 1) +
      geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
      coord_fixed(xlim = c(axis_min, axis_max), ylim = c(axis_min, axis_max)) +
      labs(
        x = paste("Site", x_site),
        y = paste("Site", y_site)
      ) +
      annotate("text", x = axis_min + 1.5, y = axis_max - 1.5, label = eq_label,
               hjust = 0, vjust = 1, size = 3.2) +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
      theme(
        axis.title = element_text(size = 10),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 9),
        plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 5)
      )

    plot_matrix[[index]] <- p
  }
}

# Display the full 6x6 grid of comparisons
grid_plot <- grid.arrange(grobs = plot_matrix, ncol = n_sites, nrow = n_sites)
print(grid_plot)

```

```{r}
# Combine all 24-hour filter data
df_combined_24hr <- all_dates %>%
  left_join(df_0034_24hr, by = "date_local") %>%
  left_join(df_0038_24hr, by = "date_local") %>%
  left_join(df_0045_24hr, by = "date_local") %>%
  left_join(df_0060_24hr, by = "date_local") %>%
  left_join(df_0065_24hr, by = "date_local") %>%
  left_join(df_0073_24hr, by = "date_local")
```



```{r}
# Load libraries
library(dplyr)
library(geosphere)  # For distHaversine
library(tidyr)

# Create a dataframe with site IDs and their coordinates
site_coords <- data.frame(
  Site = c("0034", "0038", "0045", "0060", "0065", "0073"),
  Latitude = c(mean(df_0034$latitude, na.rm = TRUE),
               mean(df_0038$latitude, na.rm = TRUE),
               mean(df_0045$latitude, na.rm = TRUE),
               mean(df_0060$latitude, na.rm = TRUE),
               mean(df_0065$latitude, na.rm = TRUE),
               mean(df_0073$latitude, na.rm = TRUE)),
  Longitude = c(mean(df_0034$longitude, na.rm = TRUE),
                mean(df_0038$longitude, na.rm = TRUE),
                mean(df_0045$longitude, na.rm = TRUE),
                mean(df_0060$longitude, na.rm = TRUE),
                mean(df_0065$longitude, na.rm = TRUE),
                mean(df_0073$longitude, na.rm = TRUE))
)

# Create a distance matrix (in km) using geosphere::distHaversine
distance_matrix <- outer(
  1:nrow(site_coords), 
  1:nrow(site_coords), 
  Vectorize(function(i, j) {
    distHaversine(site_coords[i, c("Longitude", "Latitude")], 
                  site_coords[j, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]) / 1000  # Convert to km
  })
)

# Add row and column names
rownames(distance_matrix) <- site_coords$Site
colnames(distance_matrix) <- site_coords$Site

# Convert to long format (including self-pairs)
site_distances <- as.data.frame(as.table(distance_matrix)) %>%
  rename(Site1 = Var1, Site2 = Var2, Distance_km = Freq) %>%
  mutate(
    Site1 = as.character(Site1),
    Site2 = as.character(Site2)
  )

# View result
print(site_distances)
```


```{r}


```


```{r}

```




Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.
